source.partners: НЗОК договорни партньори (reports.nhif.bg/nhif_reports/nhif_partners) — Рег.№ ЛЗ + управител + седалище
source.register: Търговски регистър (tr_companies/tr_officers) — EIK. Match verified by manager + type + legal form; famous cases hand-verified.

note: No public register carries BOTH the НЗОК Рег.№ ЛЗ and the EIK, so this is a high-precision verified match, not an authoritative lookup. Unmatched facilities carry eik:null.
